Location Focus

Stockport projects shaped by detail, not generic packages.

The studio approach suits Stockport properties that need robust sequencing, envelope awareness and a more composed finish language across full bathroom renovations, kitchen installation and refurbishment, large-format tiling, carpentry, wall systems and flooring installation.

Curated Scope

How the studio tends to shape work in Stockport.

01

Bathrooms

Waterproofing, tile lines and trim details handled with premium discipline.

02

Kitchens

Storage logic and finish tone resolved before fit-out.

03

Wall systems

Internal or external wall packages discussed as part of a whole brief.

Selected Project

Exterior-linked renovation package

A scope where exterior carpentry and envelope detail had to sit cleanly alongside premium interior work.

Exterior and interior coordination Wall-system scope Finish-first sequencing

FAQ

Questions we usually answer before a Stockport brief starts.

Do you handle external envelope details?

Yes, where exterior wall and finish work need to be integrated into the full project brief.

Is this only for large projects?

No. The real threshold is design fit and finish ambition, not simply project size.

Can you coordinate multiple trades?

Yes. The studio structure is designed specifically to keep multi-trade work coherent.
